text.title: OWASP Top 10 Security Tests
text.summary: Automated pytest-based security tests covering the OWASP Top 10: access control, injection, XSS, authentication failures.

rule.statement: Assert exact HTTP status codes (401/403/400) and assert that sensitive data is absent from the response body. Never assert only that `status_code != 500`.
rule.rationale: "Not 500" passes even on a 200 OK that returned the victim's data. An access control test must assert the correct denial code AND confirm the resource was not returned.
